reasoning: The control 3.3.4 requires alerting in the event of an audit logging process failure. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and configured to alert on failures. This involves setting up Kubernetes audit logs and configuring mechanisms to alert when these logs fail or are misconfigured. Additionally, ensuring audit log retention is configured helps in maintaining accountability.
title: 3_3_4: 3.3.4 Alert in the event of an audit logging process failure
